pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamic injection of test logs
setup_task.sh dynamic injection of test logs
Wazuh public documentation (Rule 5715: sshd authentication success) and task instructions

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for wazuh_env implement_authorized_ssh_whitelist task. Confirmed that the test logs are synthetically generated and injected via setup_task.sh, establishing 'ga' as the authorized user and 'intruder' as the unauthorized user. The required custom rule ID (100500) and list path ('/var/ossec/etc/lists/authorized_users') match the explicit task instructions and verifier scripts, while the parent SID (5715) corresponds to the real Wazuh built-in rule for SSH authentication success.
